REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO QUASH SUMMONS FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, JAYNE K

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JAYNE JONES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON THE INDIVIDUAL ASSERTING CONTROL TO DEFENDANT'S BUILDING IS SUFFICIENT, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THAT IT RESULTED IN THE PAPERS REACHING DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Declarations Of Jayne K. Jones , Derek Elliot And Jake Bishop In Support
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JAYNE JONES' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON THE INDIVIDUAL ASSERTING CONTROL TO DEFENDANT'S BUILDING IS SUFFICIENT, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THAT IT RESULTED IN THE PAPERS REACHING DEFENDANT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB/AY)

Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
